'''jalumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemonist|mnemonist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemonist|mnemonist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jalumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jælimith|jælimith]] || [[word:jælimij|jælimij]] || [[word:jælimish|jælimish]] || [[word:jælimi|jælimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jalulumuth|jalulumuth]] || [[word:jalulumuj|jalulumuj]] || [[word:jalulumush|jalulumush]] || [[word:jalulumu|jalulumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jalumuth|jalumuth]] || [[word:jalumuj|jalumuj]] || [[word:jalumush|jalumush]] || [[word:jalumu|jalumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalufmuth|jalufmuth]] || [[word:jalufmuj|jalufmuj]] || [[word:jalufmush|jalufmush]] || [[word:jalufmuf|jalufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jalumuthu|jalumuthu]] || [[word:jalumuju|jalumuju]] || [[word:jalumushu|jalumushu]] || [[word:jalumuku|jalumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jalumuth|jalumuth]] || [[word:jalumuj|jalumuj]] || [[word:jalumush|jalumush]] || [[word:jalumu|jalumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jalumuthul|jalumuthul]] || [[word:jalumujul|jalumujul]] || [[word:jalumushul|jalumushul]] || [[word:jalumukul|jalumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jalumuthuthu|jalumuthuthu]] || [[word:jalumujuju|jalumujuju]] || [[word:jalumushushu|jalumushushu]] || [[word:jalumuku|jalumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jalumuthun|jalumuthun]] || [[word:jalumujun|jalumujun]] || [[word:jalumushun|jalumushun]] || [[word:jalumukun|jalumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jalumuthuoro|jalumuthuoro]] || [[word:jalumujuoro|jalumujuoro]] || [[word:jalumushuoro|jalumushuoro]] || [[word:jalumukuoro|jalumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
